codeReview.summary: Footer/download flow is mostly implemented, but redaction download fails for password-protected PDFs because the redaction trigger omits password callback handling.

issues.description: FooterBar calls redactDocument(file, entities, onProgress) without the onPassword callback. redactDocument re-opens the PDF via loadPDF(file, onPassword), so encrypted PDFs that reached preview via password entry cannot be reopened during download; the call throws and transitions to ERROR instead of downloading and reaching DONE. Supporting evidence: password callback wiring exists only during detection in src/components/DropScreen.tsx:48-53.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The ui-worker verification procedure did not force regression checks for password-protected PDFs when wiring download/redaction flows, allowing an encrypted-PDF breakage to slip through.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff interactiveChecks only cover a standard PDF flow (test-pii.pdf). Code path in src/components/FooterBar.tsx:31-36 omits onPassword, while password handling is isolated to src/components/DropScreen.tsx:48-53.

summary: Fail: UI and state wiring for download/done are present, but encrypted PDFs cannot complete the download flow due to missing password callback propagation into redactDocument.
